headline: Kraft Heinz Bets On JELL O Simply And Cleaner Label Demand
summary: JELL-O Simply is a new Kraft Heinz product line made without artificial sweeteners or colors and with reduced sugar. The launch responds to rising consumer demand for simpler, cleaner ingredient lists in packaged foods. Kraft Heinz (NasdaqGS:KHC) is leaning into the shift toward cleaner labels with JELL-O Simply, positioning one of its most recognizable dessert brands around ingredients many shoppers are actively seeking out. Across the packaged food sector, large companies are revisiting...
